raw_consumer_statement:
I was charged {$980.00} to my credit card account on XX/XX/XXXX, from XXXX XXXX # XXXX XXXX, XXXX. 

The charge is in error because I returned the purchased item, but the merchant instead charged me an additional {$980.00} instead of issuing a refund. 

On XX/XX/XXXX, I purchased a bracelet from XXXX XXXX for {$980.00}. I returned the item on XX/XX/XXXX, and the seller promised to issue a refund. Despite repeated requests and attempts to resolve the issue directly with the merchant, I have not received the refund to date. 

Additionally, I filed a claim with XXXX on XX/XX/XXXX regarding this transaction ( XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX. Despite the Bank stated the issue resolved, the disputed amount of {$980.00} remains outstanding on my account balance.
